violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. No tongs or deli paper provided for the bread and muffin station. Food located in close proximity to the hand sink, splash marks present on waffle maker.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Paint overspray on the countertop by the 3 compartment sink.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. Currently was connected to a bathroom cleaner/disinfectant.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not provided until asked for.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel were not provided until asked.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Unlabeled chemical spray bottle located underneath the hand sink in the breakfast bar.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
